name: nerve-mcp
description: MCP server for Nerve — gives AI agents runtime access to iOS apps

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run bundle-framework
scripts.bundle-framework: bash ../scripts/build-framework.sh && rm -rf framework && mkdir -p framework/Nerve.framework && cp ../.build/inject/Nerve.framework/Nerve framework/Nerve.framework/ && cp ../.build/inject/Nerve.framework/Info.plist framework/Nerve.framework/
